categoryTitle: Alert/notification trigger, visibility, and preference control
description: Validate alert creation for each transaction/change event, intended cross-role visibility, and user-level control over alert categories.

testCases.title: Employer creates drive request creates intended alert
steps: Login as employer and execute transaction at /dashboard/employer/drives
Verify new alert/notification entry is visible
Open alert target and verify deep-link/context is correct
expectedResult: Alert entry is created for intended viewer(s)
Alert content matches transaction context
Unauthorized roles do not see this alert

Unauthorized roles do not see this alert

testCases.title: User can view alert/notification preference settings
steps: Verify alert visibility follows configured preference
expectedResult: Preference control is available and persists after refresh/login
Suppressed categories do not show new alerts
Enabled categories show new alerts

testCases.title: User can disable one alert category
steps: Verify alert visibility follows configured preference
expectedResult: Preference control is available and persists after refresh/login
Suppressed categories do not show new alerts
Enabled categories show new alerts

testCases.title: Disabled alert category suppresses future alert creation/visibility
steps: Verify alert visibility follows configured preference
expectedResult: Preference control is available and persists after refresh/login
Suppressed categories do not show new alerts
Enabled categories show new alerts

testCases.title: User can re-enable alert category and receive alerts again
steps: Verify alert visibility follows configured preference
expectedResult: Preference control is available and persists after refresh/login
Suppressed categories do not show new alerts
Enabled categories show new alerts

testCases.title: Alert preferences are isolated per user
steps: Verify alert visibility follows configured preference
expectedResult: Preference control is available and persists after refresh/login
Suppressed categories do not show new alerts
Enabled categories show new alerts

testCases.title: All transaction/change events mapped to alert rules
steps: Build inventory of all transaction + status-change events
Map each event to expected alert recipients
Execute sample events and verify alert creation
Publish gap register for missing/incorrect alert behavior
expectedResult: Complete mapping exists for alert coverage
Any missing alert triggers or wrong recipient mapping is logged
